library.title: The Archie Library
library.summary: A contested manuscript read more than one way — Beinecke MS 408, the same undeciphered marks read three ways across three exhibits.

exhibits.title: The Rosettes
exhibits.description: A single-folio deep-zoom study: the Rosettes foldout (f85v–86r), the largest spread in MS 408, read three ways — cipher, hoax, and natural language — over one canvas.

exhibits.title: The Whole Manuscript
exhibits.description: A grid of all eleven folios of MS 408 across its six sections — herbal, astronomical, balneological, cosmological, pharmaceutical, and recipes — to browse side by side, each readable three ways, with a sounded page.

exhibits.title: Reading the Unreadable
exhibits.description: A narrative walk through the six divisions of MS 408 — herbal to recipes — pausing on each to read the same undeciphered marks three ways, ending on a page sounded aloud.
